name: glucose
description: Glucose is a simple sugar used as a sweetener and energy source in food products, contributing to texture and browning.
raw_text: Glucose (Explained + Products) Products Ingredients Decode INCI Login Register Login Register Products Ingredients Decode INCI Follow us on our new Insta page » Glucose goodie What-it-does: moisturizer/humectant Official CosIng Information All Functions: humectant CAS #: 50-99-7 | EC #: 200-075-1 Ph. Eur. Name: Dextrosum / Glucosum | Chemical/IUPAC Name: Glucose Details A fancy name for sugar . Luckily when you put it on your skin it's good for you not like when you eat it. :) It has water-binding properties, which means that it helps to keep your skin nice and hydrated .
